register.title: UOB Mortgage Repricing Risk (Mar 2028)
register.description: SORA-linked mortgage reprices on renewal March 2028; sustained elevated rates could increase debt service by SGD 8,000–14,000/yr.

register.title: Singapore Landed Property Policy Risk
register.description: Government could introduce additional landed cooling measures; ABSD not applicable to Zhang Xi if Singapore PR/citizen, but foreign buyer rules could impact re-sale.

register.title: Building Age — Major Maintenance (1998)
register.description: 28-year-old structure; roof, drainage, M&E systems approaching major service intervals; capex of SGD 50,000–150,000 possible within 5–10 years.

register.title: Singapore Landed Supply Constraint
register.description: Singapore freehold landed supply is constitutionally constrained (no GLS for freehold landed); supports long-term value but may limit liquidity.

scenarios.name: SORA +150bps at Renewal — Higher Debt Service
scenarios.verdict: Manageable — additional SGD 18,700/yr debt service ($13,900 USD). Conservative 26.4% LTV means strong refinancing options remain available.

scenarios.name: Singapore Landed Market +10% — Wealth Appreciation
scenarios.verdict: Strong wealth creation scenario — SGD 7.2M becomes SGD 7.9M. LTV improves to 24%. Primary residence hold remains optimal strategy.

mitigationPlan.action: Begin UOB renewal process September 2027; obtain quotes from DBS, OCBC, StanChart for comparison
